entity.name: Aaryan Gupta

products.name: TokenQ

products.name: RxPad Pro

products.name: LabTrack Pro

products.name: RecallMD
products.description: Automated appointment reminders and patient follow-up system via Meta WhatsApp API.

products.name: CareReview
products.description: Healthcare reputation management software routing positive reviews to Google Maps.

services.name: Technical Project Management
services.description: Jira setup, Agile sprint governance, scoping documentation, and development team coordination.

services.name: HealthTech Digital Consulting

services.name: AI Workflow Automation
